entropy_inventory.description: Archive date environment overrides are replay-relevant clock/date entropy and are rejected during replay when present; values are never disclosed.
Archive dry-run replay assumes the deterministic default archive date unless an explicit rejected override is present.
Replay receipts use canonical JSON, sorted keys, and policy-owned string data rather than locale-sensitive formatting.
Root-specific checkout and temporary prefixes are normalized before portable hash computation; display paths remain operator-facing.
entropy_inventory.source: current working directory and replay root

entropy_inventory.description: Replay manifests sort root-relative paths and hash file contents; volatile host metadata is not part of portable evidence.
entropy_inventory.source: directory iteration order and file metadata

entropy_inventory.description: Replay discloses that toolchain identity is represented by policy and receipt hashes rather than raw host paths.
entropy_inventory.source: cairn binary, Nix/devshell, and external checker versions

entropy_inventory.description: Replay assumes a reviewed Nix-built Cairn surface and does not capture machine-specific store paths in portable evidence.

environment_attestation.description: Replay discloses the Cairn package name and version compiled into the binary, not the host binary path.
Replay binds the generated policy content by BLAKE3 hash.
Replay binds the reviewed entropy inventory by BLAKE3 hash.
Replay discloses the selected case and group ids used to produce evidence.
Replay binds this reviewed environment attestation policy by BLAKE3 hash.
Replay discloses reviewed build/toolchain context as policy facts and avoids machine-specific store paths.

groups.description: Cheap status and validation replay preflight
